text: GC-MS KMD analysis identifies 5 distinct oligomeric clusters in the PS sample under specified measurement conditions
what_would_change_this: Independent replication using a different detector type showing different cluster count, or evidence of systematic bias in baseline removal algorithm

uncertainty_summary.summary_text: Single pipeline repeat only — independent replication absent

validity_scope.description: Valid for polystyrene samples analyzed by GC-MS in mass range 50-500 m/z with SNR >= 3.0
